interaction_phrase: together with
occurrence_sentence: QuTech, together with Intel, has designed and fabricated an integrated circuit that can operate at extremely low temperatures when controlling qubits, the essential building blocks of a quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: QuTech team
occurrence_sentence: The QuTech team in the lab next to the cryogenic refrigerator hosting the qubit and Horse Ridge. The Horse Ridge output is visible on the screen on the bottom right. From top to bottom, from left to right: Bishnu Patra, Jeroen van Dijk, Xiao Xue, Fabio Sebastiano (holding the qubits), Lieven Vandersypen, Masoud Babaie (holding Horse Ridge).

interaction_phrase: together with Intel
occurrence_sentence: QuTech, together with Intel, has designed and fabricated an integrated circuit that can operate at extremely low temperatures when controlling qubits, the essential building blocks of a quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: presented their findings during the ISSCC Conference
occurrence_sentence: This paves the way for the crucial integration of qubits and their controlling electronics in the same chip, according to the scientists who presented their findings during the ISSCC Conference in San Francisco.

interaction_phrase: team lead Fabio Sebastiano from QuTech
occurrence_sentence: "This result brings us closer to a large-scale quantum computer which can solve problems that are intractable by even the most powerful supercomputers" said team lead Fabio Sebastiano from QuTech and the Faculty of Electrical Engineering, Mathematics and Computer Science.

interaction_phrase: teamed up with
occurrence_sentence: QuTech teamed up with Intel to address this precise challenge.

interaction_phrase: from QuTech
occurrence_sentence: "This result brings us closer to a large-scale quantum computer which can solve problems that are intractable by even the most powerful supercomputers" said team lead [Fabio Sebastiano](https://qutech.nl/person/fabio-sebasiano/) from QuTech and the Faculty of Electrical Engineering, Mathematics and Computer Science.

interaction_phrase: at ISSCC
occurrence_sentence: The paper and the presentation at ISSCC specifically describe the Intel 22-nm FFL FinFET cryo-CMOS controller that operates at 3 K over the wide band from 2 to 20 GHz and is able to drive up to 128 frequency-multiplexed spin qubits or transmons in a 1-GHz band.
